content:
# Recommendations — after iter-040

## Headline: 1.1.3 `H_tensor` CLOSED (5th §1 deep theorem)
- `H_tensor` + `htensorComparison_unit_isIso` are `sorryAx`-free; build exit 0; sorry 2→1.
- **DO NOT reopen the 1.1.3 lane.** The convergence-watch tripwire from @039 (a 3rd distinct coherence ⇒ reconsider piecemeal-anchoring vs. a real `MonoidalCategory X.Modules`) did **not** fire — exactly ONE sanctioned anchor (`External.tensorMod_rightUnitality`) closed it. Piecemeal-anchoring was the right call.

## Next frontier (planner to choose)
- Only one sorry remains in `Basic.lean`: `ext_finite_flat` (1.10, line 2576). It is **infra-blocked** — `IsLFPAndFlatOn` opaque, `relExt` needs internal-`ℰxt` + `Rⁱf_*`, both absent from Mathlib (overlaps the PAUSED internal-monoidal/internal-ℰxt layer). **Do NOT re-assign `ext_finite_flat` as a proof target without first building or anchoring that infrastructure** — it has been correctly parked for many iters.
- With §1's five deep theorems (1.1.1/1.1.2/1.1.3/1.2/1.3/1.4 substrate) landed and 1.10 the lone infra-blocked hole, the planner should decide the next structural move: either (a) build/anchor the internal-`ℰxt` + `Rⁱf_*` layer to unblock 1.10, or (b) declare the §1 scoped milestone met and consult the user (via `USER_HINTS.md` / `TO_USER.md`) on whether to extend scope. This is a strategy fork — surface it to the user.

## Reusable proof patterns (also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **B2 — pure term-mode assembly on sheafification `≫`:** `rw`/`simp`/`Functor.map_comp` (and even `rw` of a clean local hyp) all stall on these composites. Build the chain with `congrArg (g ≫ ·)`/`(· ≫ g)`, `Category.assoc _ _ _`, `F.map_comp _ _`, `Eq.trans` — defeq-tolerant, bypasses `rw`'s discrimination tree.
- **B1 — naturality legs across the `tensorBC`↔`tensorMod F (f^*·)` defeq boundary:** type the leg directly in `tensorMod F (f^*H)` form and close by `exact` (the naturality square emerges in the defeq `tensorBC f F (H..)` form).
- **Last-calc-step gotcha:** end a `calc` whose RHS is `(BC F).map i.inv` at the defeq `(tensorLeft F).map (f^*i.inv)` form, not the `tensorBaseChangeFunctor` form (else `Category.assoc`'s metavariable is unsynthesizable). `calc` closes up to defeq.
- **Anchor-and-assemble (now 5×):** when a needed fact is a coherence of an anchor-backed structure with no Mathlib instance, anchor the *single* general coherence the proof needs (general over its parameters, never goal-specialized) rather than building the full structure — strictly less anchoring, more faithful.

## Blocked — do not retry without structural change
- `ext_finite_flat` (1.10): absent internal-`ℰxt` + `Rⁱf_*`. (4+ iters parked.)

## Housekeeping (LOW, optional)
- **Proof-block `\leanok` gap (sync follow-up):** completed deep theorems in `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard_Basic.tex` (`lem:H_tensor`, `lem:htensorComparison_unit_isIso`, and historically `lem:H_tensor_invertible`@034) carry statement-block `\leanok` but **unmarked proof blocks**, despite being `sorryAx`-free. `sync_leanok` (added=0) does not appear to mark proof blocks for these anchor-assemble theorems. Left untouched this iter to preserve file-wide parity, but the planner/sync may want to decide whether proof-block `\leanok` should be applied uniformly (the dashboard understates proof completion otherwise).
- `External.lfp_free_at_point_locallyFree` (authored @029) is unused — prune candidate.
- 4 cosmetic >100-char line warnings on the new term-mode lines (style only).
- To silence the recurring blueprint-doctor axiom re-flag (27 `External.*`), the user could list them in `archon-protected.yaml` (YAML is user-only).
